rule_catalog.rationale: All registered JavaScript, HTML, and inline CSS must be parser-valid.
rule_catalog.remediation: Correct the parser diagnostic at the reported source location.

rule_catalog.rationale: Duplicate top-level declarations can shadow runtime behavior.
rule_catalog.remediation: Keep one canonical declaration and remove the duplicate.

rule_catalog.rationale: Duplicate DOM IDs make UI reads and writes target-dependent.
rule_catalog.remediation: Assign each rendered element a unique ID and update references.

rule_catalog.rationale: Runtime globals must load before dependent application code.
rule_catalog.remediation: Restore the canonical dependency order in index.html.
